untranslatable_reason: MMD pattern requires precise multi-phase leg measurement (first decline → 48% retrace in bull market → second decline) with specific proportions in price and time. Available indicators cannot measure: (1) exact retrace percentages of specific prior legs, (2) sequential phase identification with proportional validation, (3) market regime classification (bull vs bear). Stop loss and take profit rules are marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no values provided. Pattern is theoretically translatable but requires custom multi-bar lookback logic beyond point-in-time indicator comparisons.
